description_long: This ornate stone water fountain features a classical architectural design with a prominent arched pediment, decorative reliefs, and a central basin supported by a pedestal. The front face displays engraved plaques and inscriptions, with a sculpted spout above the bowl, flanked by two stone spheres on short pillars. The lower section includes a semicircular catchment basin bordered by a thick stone rim, with water stains and mineral deposits visible from prolonged use. The rear side is flat and inscribed, with three additional outlets and a rectangular trough at the base. The structure is predominantly made of light-colored stone, with subtle weathering and patina, and is designed to be a permanent fixture in public urban spaces.
description: An ornate, classical stone water fountain with a sculpted spout, engraved plaques, and a semicircular basin, flanked by decorative pillars and spheres.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched pediment, central spout, engraved plaque, and semicircular basin with decorative pillars and spheres.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the columnar side detail, and the thickness of the stone rim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat inscribed surface, three outlets, and a rectangular trough at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the column detail and the semicircular basin's curvature.
attribute_spout_type: sculpted animal-head spout projecting horizontally from the upper central section
attribute_mounting_location: floor-standing, embedded in ground with a broad stone base
attribute_signage_or_labeling: engraved stone plaques with inscriptions and commemorative text on the front and rear faces
attribute_surrounding_infrastructure: semicircular stone catchment basin and rectangular trough integrated into the base
